_meta.purpose: iter-3 LIVE probe — combined Round-1 (training-set) + Round-2 (FP-stress NEW negatives) for false_equivalence_levelling after Option B broadening.
_meta.ROUND_1_FLAG: Round-1 entries (P-EN-LIVE-01..06 + N-EN-LIVE-01..08 + N-RU-LIVE-01..04) are TRAINING-SET — iter-3 patterns were designed from Round-1's FN classes. Catch number on Round-1 is implementation verification, NOT generalization claim.
_meta.ROUND_2_FLAG: Round-2 entries (P-EN-R2-* and N-*-R2-*) were collected with iter-3 patterns IN PLACE for held-out validation. Round-2 yielded 0 positives (FE-rhetoric absent from non-paywalled fetchable open-web sources tried) and 8 NEW negatives for FP-stress.
_meta.honest_scope: No held-out positive validation possible. Tier 1 promotion blocked. iter-3 may ship as v0.3.0-pre.2 patch IF Round-1 catch ≥ 4/6 AND combined FP ≤ 5%.

entries.text: Both the Democrats and the Republicans are vested in this machine and are funded by billionaires.
entries.notes: iter-3 Class 1 target — both [Named X] and [Named Y] + leveling predicate.

entries.text: The odd that the political establishment will initiate the move to replace neo-liberalism or even overhaul it are virtually non-existent.
entries.notes: iter-3 Class 2 边缘. «Political establishment will initiate» — verb-list narrow (will-never/always); FE-spirit but ambiguous-with-analytical. Acceptable miss.

entries.text: Apparently, both parties are dominated by war pigs.
entries.notes: iter-3 Class 3 target — both (sides|parties|teams|camps) + non-canonical leveling predicate.

entries.text: elected officials who purport to oppose domestic warrantless spying when the other party is in the White House typically change their minds once their party is in power.
entries.notes: iter-3 Class 4 target — purport to oppose ... change their minds. Window 80→120 chars after audit.

entries.text: as Trump, Mike Johnson, Nancy Pelosi, and so many others have proven, their steadfast opposition magically transforms into vehement support once they ascend to power.
entries.notes: iter-3 Class 5 target — opposition transforms into support.

entries.text: Trump on Monday demanded that FISA be fully renewed: yet again, with no reforms, safeguards, or limits of any kind.
entries.notes: Out-of-scope — sentence-level extraction loses article-level FE framing. Acceptable miss by design.

entries.text: The Dissident Right rejects mutual forbearance in favor of a 'will-to-power' political approach and cannot save America's culture by sacrificing its creed.
Contra AOC, there are makers and moochers on every rung of the income ladder.
Wall Street firms see new customers. Progressives see expanded government involvement in retirement. Some conservatives see a backdoor route to Social Security privatization.
entries.notes: FP stress-test — multi-perspective enumeration (3 stakeholders, distinct views).

entries.text: The relationship has stabilized since the two leaders met last November, but it remains fragile—defined more by an absence of friction than any affirmative agenda.
Both leaders will likely announce Chinese purchases of American products, such as Boeing airplanes and agricultural goods.
A weak Democratic Party opened the gates for the Republican Party in 2024, and they haven't made inroads since.
Ambition must be made to counteract ambition.
The remedy for this inconveniency is to divide the legislature into different branches.
Лица, пытающиеся захватить российские активы, являются ворами и жуликами.
Страны ЕС не хотят становиться соучастниками этого воровства.
Уровень отношений между странами БРИКС системно растет.
Фактическое поражение в самими же начатой войне продемонстрировало глубину раскола между различными частями некогда единого западного мира.
entries.notes: FP stress — contains «расхождения / различных частях» which inhibitor-pattern-adjacent. Should NOT fire.

entries.text: This Supreme Court decision may still end up being a political victory for Republicans, but it isn't as straightforward as it looks.
entries.notes: FP-stress NEW source. Substantive analytical comparison.

entries.text: GOP efforts to gerrymander congressional districts by redistributing Democratic voters could backfire if large numbers of voters reject Trump's policies.
entries.notes: FP-stress NEW source — mentions both parties without leveling.

entries.text: A landed interest, a manufacturing interest, a mercantile interest, a moneyed interest, with many lesser interests, grow up of necessity in civilized nations.
entries.notes: FP-stress NEW source — Federalist 10 on factions (public domain).

entries.text: The regulation of these various and interfering interests forms the principal task of modern legislation.
The judiciary, on the contrary, has no influence over either the sword or the purse; no direction either of the strength or of the wealth of the society.
The interpretation of the laws is the proper and peculiar province of the courts.
The rich whom the politicians are targeting started with nothing, and are the epitome of the American dream.
entries.notes: FP-stress NEW source — substantive billionaire-critique without FE-leveling.

entries.text: Under capitalism, the underclass has always been permanent, but under AI Capitalism, the permanent underclass will eventually encompass almost all of us.
entries.notes: FP-stress NEW source — has «under X / under Y» comparative + «always been» (potential N-fp risk if naturalization detector fires; not relevant for FE).
